name: Nunu, the Ogdoadic Remnant
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>溟</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>めい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>界</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>滓</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おり</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－ヌル
desc: You can send this card from your hand to the GY; send 1 DARK Reptile monster from your Deck to the GY. If you control no monsters, or you control an "Ogdoadic" monster: You can Special Summon this card from your GY, but banish it when it leaves the field, also you cannot Special Summon monsters, except Reptile monsters, while this card is face-up in the Monster Zone. You can only use each effect of "Nunu, the Ogdoadic Remnant" once per turn.
mnst_eff: You can send this card from your hand to the GY; send 1 DARK Reptile monster from your Deck to the GY. If you control no monsters, or you control an "Ogdoadic" monster: You can Special Summon this card from your GY, but banish it when it leaves the field, also you cannot Special Summon monsters, except Reptile monsters, while this card is face-up in the Monster Zone. You can only use each effect of "Nunu, the Ogdoadic Remnant" once per turn.

If you control no monsters, or you control an "Ogdoadic" monster: You can Special Summon this card from your GY, but banish it when it leaves the field, also you cannot Special Summon monsters, except Reptile monsters, while this card is face-up in the Monster Zone. You can only use each effect of "Nunu, the Ogdoadic Remnant" once per turn.

action: Sends itself from hand to Graveyard for cost
Sends from your Deck to your Graveyard
summoning: Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
Restricts the player's Special Summons to Type specific monsters
banished: Banishes itself when it leaves the field
